name: easytable-mcp
description: easyTable restaurant reservations for Claude — check availability, look up bookings, and create, modify or cancel reservations

tools.name: easytable_list_types
tools.description: List the bookable areas/types for a restaurant (e.g. indoor, bar)

tools.name: easytable_list_dates
tools.description: List bookable dates for a restaurant area and party size

tools.name: easytable_list_times
tools.description: List available time slots for a restaurant area, date, and party size

tools.name: easytable_find_bookings
tools.description: Look up a restaurant's existing bookings made with a given mobile number

tools.name: easytable_create_booking
tools.description: Create a restaurant booking (confirm-gated; reads the widget's Turnstile token via the bridge)

tools.name: easytable_healthcheck
tools.description: Check the fetchproxy bridge connection to book.easytable.com
